Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are going to construct a process tree step by step based on the description Lets break down the process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The patient arrives A and then does Registration RG and then Intake Assessment IA This is a sequence A RG IA

Name: Validation - PE
Text: After the intake assessment there is a triage sequence Triage Interview TI and then Triage Classification TC But note the process tree must connect the previous part to this Actually step 1 and step 2 are sequential The description says After the intake assessment the patient must be evaluated by the triage team

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we can have A RG IA followed by TI TC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After triage classification there is an exclusive choice between Comprehensive ECG CE and Full Blood Panel FBP So we have exclusive choice CE FBP This exclusive choice is the next step after the triage sequence

Name: Validation - IND
Text: But note we are building the entire tree Well put the whole tree together at the end

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: After the initial diagnostic test which is either CE or FBP there is a loop

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop body is Specialist Consultation SC then an exclusive choice between Targeted Medication TM and Specialized Physical Therapy SPT then a Re Diagnostic Test which is an exclusive choice between Follow up ECG FCE and Follow up Blood Analysis FBA

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The loop operator is defined as execute A then either exit or execute B and then A again

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We might need to model the condition as a silent step tau

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Alternatively we can model the loop as SC then choice TM or SPT then choice FCE or FBA with tau as the redo part

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This would mean execute the body SC then choice of treatment then choice of re diagnostic test then either exit or do tau and then repeat the body This is acceptable

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the loop when results are normal we have two activities in true concurrency Advanced Imaging AI and Nutritional Counseling NC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then we have a sequence of administrative steps Follow up Appointment Scheduling FAS and Detailed Discharge Instructions DDI

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Finally we have three activities in true concurrency Billing BL Insurance Claims Processing ICP and Medical Records Finalization MRF

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Now lets put the entire process tree together in a hierarchical way Well build the tree from the bottom up

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We sequence the arrival registration intake triage and initial diagnostic choice then the loop then the concurrency AI and NC then the administrative sequence then the final concurrency

Name: Validation - PE
Text: But note the sequence operator can have more than two children In the given process tree model the sequence operator is binary so we must use nested sequences

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will use nested sequences for the root connecting initial diagnostic loop concurrent support admin sequence and final concurrent closure
